name: Blog post
description: The canonical DOTDAY blog post. The fixed envelope (hero, quickAnswer, faq, relatedPosts, internalLinks, closingHashtags) is enforced by blogPost.schema.json and validate-post.mjs; this archetype governs the variable body: posts open with prose, close with a cta, carry at least two prose blocks and two ctas (one mid-body, one closing), and draw only from the approved block set. Rules are derived from and verified against all 19 live posts. Image and internal-link richness for NEW posts is governed by the dotday-blog-template skill; v1 rules stay at what every existing post satisfies.
